atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Product Precision Interface

Controlled, engineered, high-clarity product surfaces where state language, spacing, and UI logic outrank atmosphere.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

Structure Fit

Workbench / Tool ShellCatalog Explorer

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • tight spacing
  • clear CTA hierarchy
  • engineered polish
  • task-first framing

Borrow

  • precise spacing and copy discipline
  • screenshots that explain behavior
  • clear task and state hierarchy

Best For

  • AI tools
  • technical products
  • platform homepages
  • operator-facing tools

Avoid When

  • the page is primarily cultural or editorial
  • atmosphere matters more than interface clarity

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1919-1933

Germany

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

功能、工业和几何秩序优先。它把形式服从用途这件事系统化。

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Product Precision Interface

Use a product-precision family: engineered hierarchy, crisp screenshots, strict spacing, and copy that frames tasks and outcomes before atmosphere.
